title: Kakapos
description: Find this flightless parrot in your jungles!
body:
### 
### **Now updated to 1.20! No more GeckoLib!**

**This small mod adds the kakapo parrot to the jungles!** Try to find and tame this unique bird in your world.

You can tame it by using either **apples** or **carrots**. It can:
- Follow you around
- Sit when ordered
- Make cute custom sounds
- Dance when a jukebox is nearby

 
### That's one helpful pet!

 ![A kakapo dancing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6baf2d62e94801fb03b8ec46901ed0edf6c01552.gif)

I made this mod a few months ago as an introduction to Forge and I wanted to share it. It uses GeckoLib for the animations but hopefully i'll find time to make it a standalone mod someday.
